item.title: I’m Worried My Friends’ Son May Harm Them. What Should I Do?
Visions of America: The Revolution As You’ve Never Seen It Before
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Native Leader Who Tied His People’s Fate to the Patriot Cause
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Radical Pacifist Who Inspired the First Armed Rebellion of the Founding Era
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Teenage Soldier Who Revealed How the Patriots Really Won the War
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Housewife Whose Plays Helped Push American Toward Revolution
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Man of Faith Who Heard a Righteous Call in the Founding Credo
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Enslaved Woman Who Sued for Freedom and Emancipated Herself
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Itinerant Preacher Who Helped Secure the Separation of Church and State
item.description: For the 250th, the Times Magazine asked seven leading historians to profile a Revolutionary American whose story has rarely been told.

item.title: The Many Founders of the United States
item.description: In the past 50 years, the way we tell the story of the Revolution has become dramatically more complex. Can it still inspire us all?

item.title: Six Takeaways From the Times Investigation Into Epstein’s Death
item.description: We considered every plausible theory of his death, both official and otherwise, seeking out the most persuasive arguments and evidence for each.

item.title: The Untold Story of Jeffrey Epstein’s Death
item.description: New evidence, new interviews and the fullest investigation yet into the question of whether he killed himself.

item.title: Seth Rogen Knows the Secret to Marriage — and Being Rich in Hollywood
item.description: After three decades in the industry, the actor-writer-director-producer has figured a lot out.

item.title: What I Learned About Masculinity at Thai Kickboxing School
item.description: A week inside a grueling Muay Thai training program in Phuket.
